purpose: Track generated/python runtime and operation-executor Python files whose location alone could be mistaken for generated ownership.
completion_rule: The Python CLI completion gate may reach full-generated-cli-complete only when every generated projection entry is rendered-by-command-generation, blocking_full_completion is false for every entry, command-generation render_outputs produces the same paths, generated command modules do not import package-owned runtime helpers directly, and any remaining package-domain runtime source or generated runtime facade bridge is explicitly accepted as a permanent non-generic package boundary.

accepted_runtime_boundaries.completion_rule: Accepted runtime boundaries do not block full Python generated CLI completion only when they are package-domain source or generated facade bridges with explicit permanent ownership, conformance coverage, non-generic boundary classification, and a portable-later explanation.

entries.source_of_truth: src/agentic_workspace/contracts/python_operation_execution_inventory.json domain_runtime_primitive_refs and accepted hand-owned runtime entries
entries.runtime_boundary_reason: Root workspace primitives own live workspace inspection, selection, planning context, output emission compatibility, and package policy that is intentionally outside portable codegen primitive coverage.
entries.conformance_ref: python_operation_execution_inventory.json root workspace operation conformance refs plus generated package Python conformance
entries.what_would_make_portable_later: Move any newly deterministic file, JSON, TOML, Markdown, schema, template, managed payload, or emitted JSON/text behavior into codegen-owned primitives; keep only live inspection, mutation orchestration, provider integration, front-door dispatch, or package judgment here.
entries.generic_behavior_audit: Existing generated operations either execute portable codegen primitives or name this file through explicit domain-runtime/hand-owned inventory entries. The full-completion proof rejects generic-deterministic-runtime-debt boundary classes, so this source cannot hide generic deterministic behavior.
entries.why_not_blocking: This file is accepted permanent package-domain runtime source, not generated CLI parser/dispatch/executable ownership.

entries.source_of_truth: doctor.report and report/status operation execution inventory entries
entries.runtime_boundary_reason: Doctor diagnostics inspect live repo state, installed surfaces, generated freshness, and package configuration rather than implementing generic generated command behavior.
entries.what_would_make_portable_later: Decompose deterministic diagnostic projections into schema-backed primitives if they become stable generated behavior; leave live filesystem and package health inspection here.
entries.generic_behavior_audit: Classified as live-workspace-inspection and covered through operation inventory; it is not parser, dispatch, generated runtime handler map, fallback dispatch, or operation executor ownership.
entries.why_not_blocking: Live diagnostics are an accepted package-domain runtime boundary.

entries.source_of_truth: planning lifecycle operation inventory entries and planning conformance refs
entries.runtime_boundary_reason: Planning install/init/upgrade/uninstall behavior owns managed-surface mutation safety, dry-run policy, and lifecycle orchestration.
entries.what_would_make_portable_later: Move deterministic dry-run payload assembly and output formatting into codegen-owned primitives when modeled; keep mutation safety and lifecycle orchestration here.
entries.generic_behavior_audit: Planning lifecycle operations are inventoried as domain-runtime-via-IR or accepted hand-owned runtime with mutation-orchestration classification; generic deterministic runtime debt would block full completion.
entries.why_not_blocking: Planning lifecycle mutation orchestration is accepted permanent package-domain runtime source.

entries.source_of_truth: planning operation execution inventory entries and generated planning runtime facade bindings
entries.runtime_boundary_reason: Planning runtime projection owns closeout, evidence, reconciliation, and active planning state interpretation that remains package-specific judgment.
entries.what_would_make_portable_later: Represent deterministic planning payload transforms as schema-backed operation primitives once they no longer require active planning-state judgment.
entries.generic_behavior_audit: Planning projection calls are explicit package-boundary primitive refs in generated operation inventory; generic deterministic behavior is not counted as portable coverage and would be rejected if classified as generic-deterministic-runtime-debt.
entries.why_not_blocking: Planning state interpretation is accepted package-domain runtime, not generated CLI ownership.

entries.source_of_truth: memory lifecycle operation inventory entries and memory conformance refs
entries.runtime_boundary_reason: Memory init/install/upgrade/uninstall behavior owns package-managed mutation safety, local payload updates, and lifecycle orchestration.
entries.what_would_make_portable_later: Move deterministic dry-run payload assembly and output formatting into codegen-owned primitives when modeled; keep mutation safety and lifecycle orchestration here.
entries.generic_behavior_audit: Memory lifecycle operations are inventoried as domain-runtime-via-IR with mutation-orchestration classification; generic deterministic runtime debt would block full completion.
entries.why_not_blocking: Memory lifecycle mutation orchestration is accepted permanent package-domain runtime source.

entries.source_of_truth: memory operation execution inventory entries and generated memory runtime facade bindings
entries.runtime_boundary_reason: Memory runtime primitives own package-specific capture, promotion, routing, report, and verification behavior over local memory state.
entries.what_would_make_portable_later: Move deterministic memory file/data/template/output operations into codegen-owned primitives after their schemas are stable; keep memory policy and local-state judgment here.
entries.generic_behavior_audit: Memory runtime calls are explicit domain primitive refs in generated operation inventory and are not accepted as portable primitive coverage; generic deterministic runtime debt would block full completion.
entries.why_not_blocking: Memory package judgment is accepted permanent package-domain runtime source.

entries.current_owner: command-generation rendered facade over root workspace runtime primitives
entries.source_of_truth: operation IR primitive refs plus command_package_ir python_runtime_binding render outputs
entries.runtime_boundary_reason: The generated facade is a typed bridge from generated operation execution to accepted root workspace runtime primitives.
entries.conformance_ref: generated package Python conformance and root workspace operation conformance refs
entries.what_would_make_portable_later: Replace individual facade functions with portable codegen primitive implementations when their behavior becomes deterministic and schema-backed.
entries.generic_behavior_audit: The facade contains bridge imports only; generated command modules do not import package runtime helpers directly, and operation inventory decides which primitive refs remain package-domain.
entries.why_not_blocking: A generated facade bridge is allowed when the target package runtime source is accepted permanent and operation inventory is exhaustive.
